title: Tactile Diorama
description: Ce style incarne l'illustration d'entreprise 3D contemporaine, caractérisée par des surfaces douces et mates ainsi que des textures veloutées. Les formes sont construites à partir d'une géométrie lisse et arrondie avec une subtile diffusion sous-surfacique, illuminées par un doux éclairage de studio qui crée des dégradés fluides et une profonde occlusion ambiante. L'esthétique rappelle les jouets en vinyle haut de gamme ou les modèles tactiles en feutre, projetant une atmosphère numérique chaleureuse, accessible et immaculée.
description_en: This style embodies contemporary 3D corporate illustration, characterized by soft, matte surfaces and velvety textures. Forms are constructed from smooth, rounded geometry with subtle subsurface scattering, illuminated by gentle studio lighting that creates soft gradients and deep ambient occlusion. The aesthetic resembles premium vinyl toys or tactile felted models, projecting a warm, approachable, and pristine digital atmosphere.
description_fr: Ce style incarne l'illustration d'entreprise 3D contemporaine, caractérisée par des surfaces douces et mates ainsi que des textures veloutées. Les formes sont construites à partir d'une géométrie lisse et arrondie avec une subtile diffusion sous-surfacique, illuminées par un doux éclairage de studio qui crée des dégradés fluides et une profonde occlusion ambiante. L'esthétique rappelle les jouets en vinyle haut de gamme ou les modèles tactiles en feutre, projetant une atmosphère numérique chaleureuse, accessible et immaculée.
prompt: A highly detailed, premium 3D render executing a contemporary corporate illustration style, characterized by a pristine matte vinyl toy aesthetic. The focal point is the {{subject}}, meticulously modeled with smooth, rounded geometry, utilizing cylindrical and spherical simplified forms that avoid any sharp or aggressive angles. The image MUST occupy the absolute ENTIRE dedicated space: NO borders, NO frames, NO white margins, NO canvas edges, FULL BLEED to all four corners, the environment must stretch entirely across the canvas. The rendering technique employs physically based rendering (PBR) tailored for a stylized, non-photorealistic output, featuring soft subsurface scattering that gives the materials a lifelike yet synthetic warmth. Surface properties are highly tactile, exhibiting velvety, micro-textured finishes reminiscent of fine felt, brushed cotton, twill fabric, and matte polymer. The color palette is driven by a dominant {{primary_color}}, complemented by vibrant {{accent_color}} details and grounded by {{secondary_color}} supporting tones, all maintaining a highly saturated yet completely reflection-free, diffuse appearance. The lighting anatomy consists of a professional soft studio lighting setup: a large, diffused softbox key light positioned top-left casts gentle, rolling gradients across the curved surfaces, while a subtle fill light ensures no shadow is completely crushed. Delicate rim lighting separates the {{subject}} from the background, and deep, high-quality ambient occlusion provides a realistic weight, grounding the elements with soft contact shadows. The edge treatment features perfectly crisp, anti-aliased 3D geometric boundaries with zero depth-of-field blur on the subject, ensuring a sharp, graphic read. The overall atmosphere is approachable, modern, friendly, and impeccably clean, devoid of any film grain or noise. 3d render, blender, cinema4d, octane render, matte finish, softbox lighting, ambient occlusion, velvet texture, vinyl toy aesthetic, corporate illustration, rounded geometry, subsurface scattering, tactile materials, smooth gradients, pristine digital art, soft contact shadows, diffuse reflection, full bleed, edge-to-edge, no border, no frame, no canvas, occupying entire space

Surface properties are highly tactile, exhibiting velvety, micro-textured finishes reminiscent of fine felt, brushed cotton, twill fabric, and matte polymer. Delicate rim lighting separates the {{subject}} from the background, and deep, high-quality ambient occlusion provides a realistic weight, grounding the elements with soft contact shadows upon the {{background_color}} plane. The overall atmosphere is approachable, modern, friendly, and impeccably clean, devoid of any film grain or noise. 3d render, blender, cinema4d, octane render, matte finish, softbox lighting, ambient occlusion, velvet texture, vinyl toy aesthetic, corporate illustration, rounded geometry, subsurface scattering, tactile materials, smooth gradients, pristine digital art, soft contact shadows, diffuse reflection, clean cutout, isolated subject
background_prompt: A pristine, contemporary 3D studio environment devoid of any central subject, designed as a seamless cyclorama backdrop. The scene features smooth, sweeping architectural curves and rounded geometric primitives subtly placed in the background to create depth. The environment is illuminated by a soft, diffused studio lighting setup, creating gentle, rolling gradients across the matte surfaces. Deep, high-quality ambient occlusion gathers in the subtle corners and intersections of the backdrop, providing a grounded, realistic weight to the empty space. The color scheme features a dominant {{primary_color}} across the sweeping floor and back wall, accented by {{accent_color}} light spills and {{secondary_color}} shadows, maintaining a highly saturated, completely reflection-free, diffuse appearance. The texture is velvety and micro-textured, resembling matte polymer or fine felt, creating a warm, approachable, and impeccably clean digital atmosphere devoid of any noise or film grain.
background_prompt_removebg: A pristine, contemporary 3D studio environment devoid of any central subject, designed as a seamless cyclorama backdrop that transitions flawlessly into a flat {{background_color}} surface. The scene features smooth, sweeping architectural curves and rounded geometric primitives subtly placed in the background to create depth. In the foreground, acting as an ornamental border placed in front of an invisible subject, are floating matte 3D geometric rings and soft-edged abstract shapes that frame the composition. The environment is illuminated by a soft, diffused studio lighting setup, creating gentle, rolling gradients across the matte surfaces. Deep, high-quality ambient occlusion gathers in the subtle corners and intersections of the backdrop, providing a grounded, realistic weight to the space. The color scheme features a dominant {{primary_color}} across the sweeping floor and back wall, accented by {{accent_color}} light spills and {{secondary_color}} shadows, all harmonizing with the {{background_color}} elements. The texture is velvety and micro-textured, resembling matte polymer or fine felt, creating a warm, approachable, and impeccably clean digital atmosphere devoid of any noise or film grain.
